title: 【正視聽】侵侵已出賣港人 美國國會先係自己人

replies.msg:
琴日俾人揭發侵侵係六月已經同雜種秘密通話
要求支那去架入2020 美國總統大選，調查佢政治上嘅對手／仇家 （Elizabeth Warren 同 Joe Binden）
作為交換侵侵會同支那簽訂貿易協議同埋就香港事務收皮
唔會為香港人出聲
好可能因為成交咗 所以侵侵之前已經取消咗部份支那關稅
侵侵係一個自私自利 唔可信嘅人

Source
https://edition.cnn.com/2019/10/03/politics/trump-biden-call-xi-secure-server/index.html

https://www.rawstory.com/2019/10/trump-privately-told-xi-jinping-he-would-roll-over-on-hong-kong-to-get-a-trade-deal-report/?fbclid=IwAR22TJ2YtotxCvcTVwvCmTfghGHC6Hfxx9BY2-8dPmNT0BYQlmYOH--5fdU

美國參議院民主黨副主席 Elizabeth Warren 已經係twitter屌晒鬼話侵侵出賣港人
同埋呼籲美國人唔好令向美國求助嘅香港人失望
同埋堅守美國嘅核心價值，民主，自由

所以拜託各位巴絲唔好再當侵侵神咁拜

Congress can override a veto by passing the act by a two-thirds vote in both the House and the
Senate. (Usually an act is passed with a simple majority.) This check prevents the President from
blocking an act when significant support for it exists. Two-thirds is a high standard to meet—
broad support for an act is needed to reach this threshold.

Congress can override a veto by passing the act by a two-thirds vote in both the House and the
Senate. (Usually an act is passed with a simple majority.) This check prevents the President from
blocking an act when significant support for it exists. Two-thirds is a high standard to meet—
broad support for an act is needed to reach this threshold.
